fields.name: global
fields.description: Shared layout containers, typography, buttons, cards, meta boxes, notices, pagination, loading/error states, rich content formatting, navigation rows, grid layouts, and responsive breakpoints.

fields.name: layout-container
fields.description: Main app layout container and page loading spinner.

fields.name: layout-menu
fields.description: Site header with top navy bar, bottom menu bar, desktop dropdowns, member section, mobile navigation panel, and responsive breakpoints.

fields.name: layout-footer
fields.description: Site footer with column layout, social icons, bottom bar, CTA buttons, and responsive adjustments.

fields.name: cms-blocks
fields.description: Styles for CMS block types: rich text, section groups, FAQ lists, link lists, navigation grids, contact info, image+text, proposal cards, body-html classes, live preview, table blocks, sponsor year grids, and responsive breakpoints.

fields.name: cms-pages
fields.description: CMS page-level styles for home page hero/sections, event page grid/buttons, and post-event home page with video, buttons, and responsive layout.

fields.name: auth
fields.description: Authentication UI: alerts, page layout/card, profile display, forms/inputs, profile image upload, account dashboard, email center/subscriptions, and responsive breakpoints.

fields.name: page-home
fields.description: Home page loading state, hero, quick links, sections, about/CTA, notice, event info, and responsive breakpoints.

fields.name: page-news
fields.description: News listing page with card grid/pagination and news detail page with hero image, meta, content, and source link.

fields.name: page-projects
fields.description: Current/past projects listing, project detail page, project grid tables with search/sort/pagination, mobile cards, sheets data table, and responsive breakpoints.

fields.name: page-events
fields.description: Event registration form/layout/states, schedule page with agenda/presentation tables and winner cards, event archive, and schedule grid component.

fields.name: page-subscribe
fields.description: Newsletter subscribe page with info banner, form fields, org toggle, manage step, toggle switch, alerts, and responsive breakpoints.

fields.name: page-misc
fields.description: Acknowledgement page, 404 not found page, magic login, ticket login, and impersonate login pages.

fields.name: maintenance
fields.description: Maintenance mode page with UC Merced branding, status card, bypass form, info sections, footer, health check spinner, and responsive breakpoints.
